subcodes.first_line: O thou maidservant of God! Glad-tidings unto thee because of my address and answer to thee! God hath purified thee from iniquities
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه الله استبشری بخطابی و جوابی قد طهرک الله عن المعاصی عندما اغرقک فی بحر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
